[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000110 3
1 00010100 2
2 10000001 2
3 00000001 1
4 01100000 2
5 10111011 6
6 00100110 3
7 01001110 4

01 10 00100000 1
12 21 00100010 2
23 32 00000110 2
34 43 01000110 3 match 0
45 54 00010100 2 match 1
56 65 10000001 2 match 2
67 76 00000001 1 match 3
70 07 01000000 1

02 20 00100000 1
13 31 00001010 2
24 42 00100110 3 match 6
35 53 00001100 2
46 64 00000000 a
57 75 00010001 2
60 06 00000000 a
71 17 00010001 2

03 30 01000000 1
14 41 00110010 3
25 52 00000100 1
36 63 00000000 a
47 74 01010000 2
50 05 00000000 a
61 16 10000001 2 match 2
72 27 00000000 a

04 40 01100000 2 match 4
15 51 10011001 4
26 62 00000000 a
37 73 01000000 1
